# Tiny sparse phase-1 pruning-table fixture for unit tests.
# Full generated pruning tables belong in crates/cube-engine/pruning-tables/ and stay untracked.

table_version=tiny-phase1-depth1-v1
phase_role=phase1
max_depth=1
move_set=face-turn-metric-depth1
source=committed deterministic test fixture
coordinate=corner_orientation:2187
coordinate=edge_orientation:2048
coordinate=ud_slice_edge_combination:495
entries:
0=0
1253279840=1
